title: Schizodium bifidum
taxonomy: Schizodium bifidum is a genus of fungi, belonging to the family Patellariaceae within the class Sordariomycetes, and the phylum Ascomycota. This classification places it within the larger group of Ascomycota, which includes various species of fungi. Schizodium bifidum is a type of lichenicolous fungus, meaning it grows on lichens. The classification of Schizodium bifidum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other fungi. Further study of this classification can provide insights into the biology and ecology of Schizodium bifidum and its role in its environment.
